title: RIMC 2025 Admission Form

detail.short_info: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC) has Released Admission Form For RIMC 2025.

content.text: Name of the Post: RIMC 2025 Admission Form

Brief Information: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC) has Announced Notification for Conducting of Rashtriya Indian Military College, Dehradun (RIMC) 2025. Those Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the Notification & Apply Online.

items.label: Application Fee
items.text: General candidates Registration Fee: Rs. 600/- SC/ST: Rs. 555/- Payment Mode: Through Online

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: Date of Notification: 21-05-2025 Online Application Date: 21-01-2025 to 31-03-2025 Date of Examination: 01-06-2025

items.label: Age Limit
items.text: (as on 01-01-2026) Minimum Age Limit: Should not be less than 11 ½ years. Maximum Age Limit: should not have attained the age of 13 years. Age Relaxation is Applicable as per rules For More Details Refer the Notification

seo_tags: RIMC 2025 - Rashtriya Indian Military College Admission Form
